tasks.title: Redis service added to Docker Compose
tasks.description: Added redis:7-alpine with persistence and LRU eviction. Run: docker compose up redis -d

tasks.title: Seraphim Discord bridge created
tasks.description: Built seraphim_discord_bridge service with gateway/general routing and Seraphim identity system prompt.

tasks.title: Create \OpenClaw\Gateway scheduled task
tasks.description: Right-click create_gateway_task.bat in C:\Users\natza\.openclaw → Run as administrator. One-time step.

tasks.title: Fix OpenClaw Web UI model list
tasks.description: Open Windows Command Prompt (not WSL), run 'openclaw models' to add gateway/general to the UI registry (lcm.db).

tasks.title: Wire agents to Redis for short-term memory
tasks.description: Connect genesis_mind and livekit_agent to Redis for session context caching. Add redis-py to requirements.

tasks.title: Mount persona.md files into Docker containers
tasks.description: Volume mount mission-control/agents/[name]/persona.md into each agent runtime so identity loads from Mission Control at startup.

tasks.title: Build TASKS + PROJECTS + DOCS views
tasks.description: Add three new tabs to Mission Control from the video transcript blueprint.
